message.content:
You are executing a pace for the Job Jockey system. Follow these steps exactly.

## Docket

Remove the dysfunctional verb flags (--refine, --level, --muck) from jjx_paddock/jjx_curry. These flags have zero behavioral effect and trap agents.

## Files to modify

All files are under /Users/bhyslop/projects/rbm_alpha_recipemuster/Tools/jjk/vov_veiled/src/

### 1. jjrcu_curry.rs

- Delete the entire `jjrcu_CurryVerb` enum and its `impl` block (lines 15-30)
- Remove the three verb flag fields from `jjrcu_CurryArgs`: `refine`, `level`, `muck` (keep `file`, `firemark`, `note`)
- In setter mode (the `Some(new_content)` arm):
  - Remove all verb validation logic (verb_count check, verb selection)
  - Call `jjrg_curry` without the `verb` parameter — just pass `&args.file, &firemark, &new_content, args.note.as_deref()`
- Update the module doc comment to remove mention of verb flags

### 2. jjro_ops.rs (line 734+)

- Remove the `verb: &str` parameter from `jjrg_curry` function signature
- Change the chalk message format:
  - With note: `format!("paddock curried: {}", n)`
  - Without note: `"paddock curried".to_string()`

### 3. jjtcu_curry.rs

Delete all tests that reference CurryVerb or verb validation:
- jjtcu_curry_verb_as_str_refine
- jjtcu_curry_verb_as_str_level
- jjtcu_curry_verb_as_str_muck
- jjtcu_curry_verb_equality
- jjtcu_curry_verb_copy_clone
- jjtcu_verb_validation_zero_verbs_error
- jjtcu_verb_validation_one_verb_valid
- jjtcu_verb_validation_two_verbs_error
- jjtcu_verb_validation_three_verbs_error
- jjtcu_verb_selection_refine
- jjtcu_verb_selection_level
- jjtcu_verb_selection_muck
- jjtcu_error_messages_are_clear

Update note formatting tests to use new format (no verb in parentheses):
- jjtcu_note_some_formats_correctly: expect "paddock curried: manual refinement"
- jjtcu_note_none_formats_correctly: expect "paddock curried"
- jjtcu_note_all_verbs_format: DELETE this test entirely (references CurryVerb)
- jjtcu_chalk_message_format_expectations: update expected format to "paddock curried: manual update" (no verb in parens)

Keep all other tests (firemark parsing, getter/setter mode detection).

### 4. CLAUDE.md

Check /Users/bhyslop/projects/rbm_alpha_recipemuster/CLAUDE.md — the `jjx_paddock` entry already shows `jjx_paddock FIREMARK [<stdin for set]` with no verb flags, so it should be correct. Verify and leave unchanged if already correct.

## Build and Test

Run from project root (NEVER cd):
```
./tt/vow-b.Build.sh
./tt/vow-t.Test.sh
```

Both must pass.

## Wrap Discipline

DO NOT run jjx_close or mark the pace complete. When work is done:
1. Run build + tests as specified above
2. Report completion status and test results
3. STOP — the calling agent will confirm wrap with the user
